_comment: Hand-curated model entries for direct-API providers that the upstream model-catalog source does not carry (Voyage AI's direct API today, others later). Merged into llmModels at module load — see loadModelCatalog.ts. The base llmModels.json is regenerated periodically and overwriting hand-added entries would silently drop these providers; the overlay file is never touched by the regen task. Add entries here when integrating a provider whose models aren't reachable via the upstream catalog.

voyage/voyage-3.5.name: Voyage AI: Voyage 3.5
voyage/voyage-3.5.description: Voyage AI's flagship general-purpose embedding model with strong retrieval quality across domains.

voyage/voyage-3.5-lite.name: Voyage AI: Voyage 3.5 Lite
voyage/voyage-3.5-lite.description: Voyage AI's smaller, faster embedding model. Lower cost per token at a modest quality tradeoff, useful for high-volume topic-clustering workloads.

openai_codex/gpt-5.6-terra.name: Codex: GPT-5.6 Terra
openai_codex/gpt-5.6-terra.description: OpenAI's flagship coding model, billed to your ChatGPT plan. Zero token cost: usage counts against your subscription limits instead.

openai_codex/gpt-5.6-sol.name: Codex: GPT-5.6 Sol
openai_codex/gpt-5.6-sol.description: Balanced coding model on your ChatGPT plan. Zero token cost: usage counts against your subscription limits instead.

openai_codex/gpt-5.6-luna.name: Codex: GPT-5.6 Luna
openai_codex/gpt-5.6-luna.description: Fast, lighter coding model on your ChatGPT plan. Zero token cost: usage counts against your subscription limits instead.
